AI Integration Layer

OpenClaw planning engine and AI provider abstraction

Core Engine
⚠️ Critical Architecture Rule

OpenClaw is ONLY the reasoning engine

Worker owns all business logic. OpenClaw should NEVER directly call Shopify, AutoDS, or Meta APIs.

OpenClaw Execution Flow
1

Worker Builds Prompt

Context + available tools + constraints

2

OpenClaw Generates Plan

Returns structured execution_plan JSON

3

Worker Validates Plan

AJV schema validation + tool authorization

4

Worker Executes Steps

Calls tool registry, handles responses

5

Worker Persists State

Save after each step for recovery

OpenClaw Plan Schema
{
  "goal": "Create Shopify product",
  "execution_plan": [
    {
      "step_id": "1",
      "tool": "ai.generate_text",
      "action": "generate_product_description",
      "input": {
        "product_name": "Wireless Earbuds",
        "tone": "professional"
      },
      "output_schema": {
        "description": "string",
        "seo_title": "string"
      }
    },
    {
      "step_id": "2",
      "tool": "shopify.create_product",
      "action": "create_product",
      "input": {
        "title": "{{step_1.seo_title}}",
        "body_html": "{{step_1.description}}"
      },
      "depends_on": ["1"]
    }
  ],
  "estimated_duration": "30s"
}
AI Providers
OpenAIText + Image

GPT-4, GPT-4o, DALL-E

AnthropicText (long context)

Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus

OpenRouterFallback + Cost opt

Multi-provider routing

GoogleMultimodal

Gemini 1.5 Pro

Execution Constraints

Tool Authorization

Worker validates every tool call against authorized registry

Input Sanitization

All inputs validated against Zod schemas before execution

Output Validation

Tool outputs validated against expected schema

Deterministic

Same input always produces same plan structure

Replay-Safe

Plan can be re-executed from any step with saved state

Timeout Bound

Each step has max execution time, job has global timeout
